project.name: JS Playground
project.description: An interactive visual JavaScript playground where users can define variables, create reusable functions with chained method actions, compose runner flows, and see execution logs in real-time. No actual JS code is written by the user — it's a visual scripting engine.

app.description: Next.js App Router pages. Root layout wraps everything in ReduxProvider.

routes.description:
Home page — currently renders a placeholder
Hello
.
Main application page. Uses ResizablePanelGroup for a 3-column layout.

left_panel.purpose: Define and manage variables and functions

middle_panel.purpose: Define chained method actions for each function

app.layout_notes: Loads Geist Sans/Mono fonts. Wraps app with ReduxProvider.

constants.description: Maps built-in JavaScript method names to their parameter counts. 0 = no params, N = fixed N params, 'n' = variadic.

features.description: Main UI feature components, each mapped to a section of the editor page.

components.name: VariableContainer
behaviors: Input supports batch creation: 'var1, var2, var3:array, var4:string'
Inline type syntax: 'varName:dataType' sets type on creation
Validates: no empty names, no duplicates, only valid data types
Edit/delete via hover buttons on each variable item
Show/hide details toggle
Keyboard shortcuts: Alt/Cmd/Ctrl+1 to focus input, Alt/Cmd/Ctrl+E to submit

components.name: DataTypeContainer
components.purpose: Assign data types to existing variables.
behaviors: Two dropdowns: select variable, then pick data type
Submit button disabled until all variables have an assigned type
Show/hide assignment details toggle

components.name: FunctionsContainer
components.purpose: Create and manage named function definitions.
behaviors: Input supports batch creation: 'func1, func2'
Validates: no empty names, no duplicates
Edit/delete via hover buttons
Show/hide details toggle
Keyboard shortcuts: Alt/Cmd/Ctrl+3 to focus, Alt/Cmd/Ctrl+E to submit

components.name: FunctionDefiner
components.purpose: Define ordered method-chain actions for each function.
behaviors: Each action has: dataType selector, method/function selector, parameter input
Method list is filtered by the selected dataType (string or array methods)
Special magic actions available: 'math', 'temp', 'return', 'use'
Debounced updates (300ms) to avoid excessive dispatches during typing
Delete button removes individual actions

magic_actions.temp: Store a value in a temporary slot (accessed later via @temp1, @temp2, ...)
magic_actions.return: Return a specific resolved value from the function
magic_actions.use: Switch the current working value to a resolved reference

components.name: RunnerDefiner
components.purpose: Compose an ordered list of steps that set variables or call functions, then execute them.

set.description: Assign a value to a variable

call.description: Call a function on a variable

behaviors: 'Set Variable' button disabled if no typed variables exist
'Call Function' button disabled if no functions exist
'Run' button disabled if any runner step is incomplete
Debounced updates (300ms)

components.name: LogContainer
behaviors: Three filter tabs: Error (red), Warning (yellow), Info (blue)
Badge shows count per log type
Clear all logs button
Sticky header with filters
Dark slate-800 background

hooks.description: Custom React hooks used across the app.

files.name: useDebounce
files.signature: useDebounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(callback: T, delay?: number): (...args: Parameters<T>) => void
files.description: Generic debounce hook. Delays callback execution by `delay` ms (default 300). Cleans up timeout on unmount.

files.name: useRunner
files.description: Returns a `run()` function that executes all runner steps sequentially.
execution_logic: Reads variables, functions, and runner list from Redux store
For 'set' runners: finds target variable, converts value by type (string as-is, array via split on comma), dispatches updateVariableValue, logs info
For 'call' runners: finds target variable and function, calls fnRunner(variableValue, args, functionActions), dispatches updateVariableValue with result, logs info
On error: dispatches addLog with type 'error'

lib.description: Utility functions and core execution engine.

files.name: cn
files.description: Merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx + tailwind-merge.

files.name: listenToKeys
files.signature: listenToKeys(callback: (event: KeyboardEvent) => void, target?: any): () => void
files.description: Attaches a keydown event listener to a target (default: window). Returns cleanup function. Used for keyboard shortcuts in feature components.

files.name: uniqueIdentifier
files.signature: uniqueIdentifier(value: string[], args: any[], temp: any, mathTemp: any[], tempVar: any[]): any[]
files.description: Resolves special reference tokens in action parameter arrays.

Resolved to the Nth function argument (1-indexed)
Resolved to the Nth stored math result
Resolved to the Nth stored temp variable
special_tokens.@this or @t: Resolved to the current working value (temp)

files.name: fnRunner
files.signature: fnRunner(payload: any, args: any[], actions: FunctionActionInterface[]): any
files.description: Core execution engine. Processes a list of actions sequentially, maintaining a current working value (temp), a tempVar store, and a mathTemp store.

action_handlers.condition: typeof temp[action.name] === 'function' AND name is not a magic action
action_handlers.behavior: Calls temp[action.name](...resolvedArgs) and sets temp to result
Evaluates expression via mathjs evaluate(), stores result in mathTemp array, temp unchanged
Resolves value and pushes to tempVar array, temp unchanged
Sets temp to the first resolved value
Sets temp to the first resolved value (switches working context)

state.description: Redux Toolkit state management with two slices: editor and log.

FunctionActionInterface.name: string — method name like 'map', 'split', or magic 'math'/'temp'/'return'/'use'
FunctionActionInterface.value: any — array of parameter strings (may contain @tokens)

FunctionInterface.name: string
FunctionInterface.dataType: string — inferred from last action's dataType

Runner.args: any[] — arguments passed to function call

variables.addVariable: PayloadAction<{ id: string; name: string }> — push new variable with type='string', value=''
variables.updateVariable: PayloadAction<{ id: string; newName: string }> — rename variable
variables.updateVariableValue: PayloadAction<{ id: string; value: string | string[] }> — set runtime value
variables.updateDataType: PayloadAction<{ id: string; type: string }> — change variable type

functions.addFunctionName: PayloadAction<string> — push new function with auto uuid
functions.addFunctionAction: PayloadAction<{ functionId: string; action: FunctionActionInterface }> — push action with new uuid
functions.updateFunctionAction: PayloadAction<{ functionId: string; actionId: string; action: FunctionActionInterface }> — also updates func.dataType from last action

actions.addLog: PayloadAction<{ type: 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'; message: string }> — push to logs

data_flow_example.description: End-to-end example: uppercase a string and get its length.

execution: Logs: 'Setting variable myString to hello', 'Function processString called...', 'Result: 5'

key_patterns.batch_input: Comma-separated names like 'a, b, c:array' create multiple items at once in VariableContainer and FunctionsContainer.
key_patterns.type_inference: FunctionInterface.dataType is always derived from its last action's dataType — not user-set directly.
key_patterns.token_system: Action parameter values can contain @-prefixed tokens (@arg1, @this, @temp1, @math1, @space, @comma, @empty) resolved at runtime by uniqueIdentifier.
key_patterns.debouncing: FunctionDefiner and RunnerDefiner debounce input changes at 300ms to avoid flooding Redux with dispatches on every keystroke.
key_patterns.keyboard_shortcuts: VariableContainer uses Alt/Cmd/Ctrl+1 to focus and Alt/Cmd/Ctrl+E to submit. FunctionsContainer uses +3 to focus.
